title: anchusa incana
intro: Anchusa incana, also known as Alkanet, is a flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The roots and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anchusa incana include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive health and wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for topical and internal use, as well as used as a natural dye for fabrics and foods.
